name: Chicken Stock
recipeInstructions:
1. In a kettle, combine the fowl, neck, and giblets with 12 cups cold water. Bring to a boil and skim any froth.
2. Add ½ cup cold water, bring the stock to a simmer, and skim any remaining froth.
3. Add onion, leeks, carrots, celery, salt, parsley, thyme (if using), garlic clove, and bay leaf. Simmer for 2 hours, skimming the froth periodically.
4. Remove the fowl and strain the stock through a fine sieve into a bowl, pressing hard on the solids to extract all liquid.
5. Allow the stock to cool, then chill. Remove any remaining fat.
6. The stock will yield about 6 cups when cooled completely.
Make 6 cups.
